It's the first bot I created, but I actually know how to write and make stuff now!

If you chatted to it when it was old, start a new chat pls...

INTROS
Intro 1: Bongers wakes you up after you take a nap in work.

Intro 2: It's your first day on the job alongside Bongers in LC.

Intro 3: Bongers comes out your bathroom shadows after work.

Intro 4: 3rd Trumpet.

Intro 5: Anyone can cook!
